summary: W849 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract and proves the exact-inputs selected-cochain route. Dbounded.closed2OfClosedMapExactInputsW849 and the closed-embedding analogue derive exact-acyclic homotopy-object Closed2 from W735 endpoint strict-topology data plus the W736 universal left-right comparison-isomorphism input via W768, W720, W666, and W665. Dbounded.selectedCochainStrictificationOfClosedMapExactInputsW849 and the closed-embedding analogue then feed that Closed2 witness into W848, so selected-cochain strictification now depends on the comparison isomorphism and one concrete W735 branch rather than on a separate Closed2 input. The final original four-task witness and review packet are still not present.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W849 derives the selected-cochain Closed2 witness from exact-input endpoint data, but still requires the universal comparison isomorphism and one concrete W735 exact-input branch.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing because no concrete W735 closed-map or closed-embedding branch value has been constructed.
ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations still record nonterminal evidence and lack originalFourTaskContractCompletion.
The review packet still does not expose the immutable-contract negative fixtures and clean extraction audit in the completion packet shape required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct the universal left-right comparison isomorphism for arbitrary MetrizableLCA short complexes if it cannot be discharged from the existing W821/W831 surface.

Construct W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact-input branch data for MetrizableLCA, including W720 endpoint strict-topology data, W721 localized-right-adjoint data, and W722 source-triangulation data.
Use the W849 selected-cochain strictification route to expose a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after those inputs are real.
Refresh the review packet fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
